{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322035450409F95E1E0D45873BDAE"}"},"total":300},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7465680218305725246","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"不错，比较慢热，后面大概就是权谋逐鹿天下的剧情了吧，好的我就不夸大大你了，喜欢的人会自己看。就是前期有些剧情设计，描写等可有可无得有个目的，不太懂作者想写的主线是科举?兼具打脸?和影子组织的搏斗?.....，不是不能一起写，但得有主次，还有呼应，比较考验嗯。大多数读者都是先入为主，有些人物描写定位不明，没耐心的人可能看不完，也不会去看懂，大大你得整一下简介标签，还有感情线到底是什么，有没有，不然没耐心的人是不会看下去的。大大加油，整体来讲剧情险境一环扣一环很不错，还是很期待接下来的剧情，最后唯有一愿想看到结局，不管怎样，写完总会有收获的。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1738242980,"group_id":"7431898290997693465","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nw6xj2aY2Wpd3T9uTZshq1TGWRtDuAc9VAKvc7jUPPzW","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p9-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/68701a7cfc39427eba829b9bd168d7f4~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776705406&x-signature=pl%2BbQxnnJJ35biBZk%2ByjwwChbRg%3D","user_id":"1253906084007031","user_name":"梦中玉"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1253906084007031","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1726029939,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"活动专属","bg_color":"#FFFFFF","can_worn":false,"id":16,"name":"423读书日","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/c7865e1c9cc3ce8d4613e7f52dc0fd34","sticker_type":2,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/421c11bb754900f4bca176159b2e320a"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7431898290997693465","book_info":{"abstract":"刚开始就穿越到杀手训练营！
好容易历经生死逃出生天，没想到却冒名顶替了官宦子弟！
原本想走上科举路，没想到王朝末年，天下大乱！看男主如何挣出一片天！

逻辑很合理，思路清晰，主角从小到大。经历的事情也就很符合古代的。关怀人家的逻辑，没有那种强行降职的环节。 也没有乱扯一堆女主女配出来。强烈推荐。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1734363003,"group_id":"7431898290997693465","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"建议空腹拆快递，因为吃饱了蹲下来难受 ":1780,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":8903,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":25611},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7585989098863788862","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"挺好看的一本书。谋略文。应该是9以上的文。不同于以往男主穿越文。是一个皇朝大夏将倾的年代。男主父亲谋略很厉害，只是为人不正。男主弟弟（高扬公主儿子），不如男主，还想着篡位，自己作死了。男主娘亲和祖母都是明事理的人！男主优秀优秀就是优秀，文韬武略足智多谋！好喜欢男主！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1766254310,"group_id":"7431898290997693465","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N69hI+ihm16bRwCoNA1C31WxtIGHi4r0d1v2U/1wL6ov","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776700848&x-signature=IqKiHTwWvdI9JXrGcbswfncov9s%3D","user_id":"2560075985852743","user_name":"帝都大厦的无匹"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2560075985852743","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7431898290997693465","book_info":{"abstract":"刚开始就穿越到杀手训练营！
